Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Victor Lema, 415-822-8822, defendant and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT BECAUSE DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $490.00. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported 301/PJB

Notice And Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Victor Lima, As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - VICTOR LIMA, OWNER OF MISSION IRON WORKS, INCORPORATED, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : ASSIGNEE OF PLAINTIFF, CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Victor Lima, As Judgment Debtor IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR # 5220 =301/PHA
